rationale: Acting on Review 2 forces renames (affine/reductive/semisimple to Is*, AlgPoints generalize/drop, unipotent_radical_trivial stub) and deletes the trivial' lemma; the Is* and roadmap claims cannot be confirmed from the diff (only IsUnipotent exists here, HopfAlgebra style names fit the group classes, no Layer 0 text), producing churn without naming gain. Review 1 correctly identifies no material naming defects relative to the shown definitions and placeholders, so zero edits yields the better PR.
